attributes.title: Open Discover for field sidebar
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Open Discover for field sidebar","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Field filter sidebar lives in Discover

OpenSearch **Dashboards** cannot host the left-hand Selected / Available fields panel (Logz.io-style). Use **Discover** for that UI.

[**Open Logs in Discover (field sidebar)**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(observedTimestamp,log.attributes.event_category,serviceName,severityText,instrumentationScope.name,traceId,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'NOT%20%28log.attributes.event_category%3A%20%28%22epoll_io%22%20OR%20%22runtime_metrics%22%29%20OR%20log.attributes.log@target%3A%20%22may%3A%3Aio%3A%3Asys%3A%3Aselect%22%20OR%20instrumentationScope.name%3A%20%22brrtrouter%3A%3Amiddleware%3A%3Amemory%22%20OR%20body%3A%20%28*epoll*%29%20OR%20body%3A%20%22Memory%20statistics%22%29')))

In Discover: search field names → click a field → **Filter for value** / **Filter out value**, or add columns with **+**. Default query already hides `epoll_io` and `runtime_metrics` noise (raw logs stay indexed)."},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"NOT (log.attributes.event_category: (\"epoll_io\" OR \"runtime_metrics\") OR log.attributes.log@target: \"may::io::sys::select\" OR instrumentationScope.name: \"brrtrouter::middleware::memory\" OR body: (*epoll*) OR body: \"Memory statistics\")","language":"lucene"},"filter":[{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide epoll I/O noise","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"log.attributes.log@target","negate":true,"type":"phrase","params":{"query":"may::io::sys::select"}},"query":{"match_phrase":{"log.attributes.log@target":"may::io::sys::select"}}},{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide memory statistics","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"instrumentationScope.name","negate":true,"type":"phrase","params":{"query":"brrtrouter::middleware::memory"}},"query":{"match_phrase":{"instrumentationScope.name":"brrtrouter::middleware::memory"}}},{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide classified runtime noise","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"log.attributes.event_category","negate":true,"type":"phrases","params":["epoll_io","runtime_metrics"]},"query":{"bool":{"should":[{"term":{"log.attributes.event_category.keyword":"epoll_io"}},{"term":{"log.attributes.event_category.keyword":"runtime_metrics"}}],"minimum_should_match":1}}}],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: Logs
attributes.description: Companion overview for logs. For the left-hand field filter sidebar (Selected / Available fields), open Discover — Dashboard embeds cannot host that panel. Default filters hide classified runtime noise; disable filter pills to inspect raw logs. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
